_comment: CV-only content + overrides. Education and certifications are NOT on the website; they live here and are merged into the generated CV. Edit the values below, then run `python3 cv/generate_cv.py` (or the /cv command).

contact._comment: Optional. Anything set here overrides/adds to what is parsed from the page. Leave a field out (or empty) to use the page value. Supported: email, website, location, phone, linkedin.
